What We Offer

PROGRAMS &
CLINICS

🎾
Adult Tennis

Private lessons, group clinics and liveball classes for beginners through competitive players. PTR/USPTA-certified pros in a high energy environment.

All Levels
🏅
Junior Tennis

Tiny tots through tournament juniors - structured pathways that develop skills, athleticism, and a lifelong love for the game.

Ages 4-18
☀️
Summer Camps

Week-long summer tennis camps for juniors of all levels. High-energy, structured, and a ton of fun - the best way to fast-track your game over the summer.

Junior
🏸
Pickleball

Open play, clinics, and DUPR-rated leagues. Whether you are brand new or chasing a 5.0 rating, we have a court and a crew for you.

DUPR Rated
🏆
Leagues & Events

Seasonal leagues, tournaments, and social events. Compete in a community that takes the game seriously and has a great time doing it.

Competitive
🛒
Pro Shop

Racquet demos, restringing, balls, drinks, snacks, and accessories - everything you need, on-site.

On-Site
Our Story

TENNACITY
COMES
TO OC.

Tennacity built its reputation in West Hollywood on a simple idea: great coaching, open courts, and a community that pushes you further.

Now we are bringing that same DNA to Costa Mesa at 880 Junipero Dr - nestled alongside beautiful TeWinkle Park.

This is home now. We cannot wait to see you on the court.

Who We Are

ABOUT TENNACITY
COSTA MESA

Tennacity started in the heart of West Hollywood and became one of Southern California's premier racquet sports destinations - known for elite instruction, inclusive programming, and a community-first culture.

Now we are at 880 Junipero Dr - the Costa Mesa Tennis Center, with 10 tennis courts and 8 pickleball courts nestled alongside TeWinkle Park, one of the most beautiful outdoor sports settings in Orange County.

Our staff includes coaches who have worked with Grand Slam champions, former USTA Player Development coaches, and pickleball professionals building a thriving competitive community in OC.

Whether you are picking up a racquet for the first time or you are a seasoned competitor, Tennacity Costa Mesa is your home court.

🎾
10 Tennis Courts

All courts lit for evening play in a beautiful park setting at 880 Junipero Dr.

🏸
8 Pickleball Courts

Dedicated courts with DUPR leagues, open play, and clinics.

📍
TeWinkle Park

Set within one of Costa Mesa's most beloved parks - a beautiful outdoor setting.

🤝
Community First

Our coaches grew up playing here. This is a homecoming - building something lasting for OC.

The People

MEET THE
TEAM

From Grand Slam coaches to OC locals, our team brings world-class expertise and genuine passion to every session at 880 Junipero Dr.

🎾 Tennis Staff
Chris Tontz
Head Tennis Director

Former ATP touring professional and UC Irvine standout - #1 in both singles and doubles. Won a Challenger title in Grenoble. As a USTA Player Development coach, Chris coached Sloane Stephens to a US Open title and world No. 3 ranking.

Javier Pulgar
Tennis Coach

Spanish professional coach best known as the longtime coach of Brandon Nakashima - guiding him to a career-high ATP ranking of No. 29 and the 2022 Next Gen ATP Finals title.

Adam Peterson
Tennis Coach & Advisory Board

A Costa Mesa native who grew up playing right here. Former USTA Player Development coach who has coached Lindsay Davenport, Madison Keys, and Julieta Pareja (world #1 junior).

🏸 Pickleball Staff
Max Osswald
Pickleball Director

Max leads the Pickleball program at Tennacity Costa Mesa - creating league structures, DUPR-rated events, and a welcoming culture for players of every skill level across Orange County.

Patrick Strom
Pickleball Coach

Patrick brings energy, precision, and a deep love of the game to every clinic and league session. Specializing in strategy and competitive play for all levels.

⚙️ Management
Josh Osswald
Operations Manager

Josh manages the behind-the-scenes operations that keep Tennacity Costa Mesa running smoothly - facility maintenance, vendor relationships, and member experience.

Anniken Aalbu
General Manager

Anniken oversees all daily operations at Tennacity Costa Mesa - from court scheduling and staff management to community events and partnerships.

⭐ Advisory Board
Adam Peterson
Tennis Advisor

Costa Mesa native, former USTA Player Development coach. Coached Lindsay Davenport, Madison Keys, and world #1 junior Julieta Pareja.

Chris Tontz
Tennis Advisor

Former ATP touring pro, UC Irvine #1, USTA coach of US Open champion Sloane Stephens.

Steve Nash
Sports & Culture Advisor

Two-time NBA MVP, Basketball Hall of Famer (2018), and passionate tennis player. Brings his love of sport and community-building to Tennacity.

Boris Kodjoe
Ambassador & Advisor

Actor, model, and former collegiate tennis star at Virginia Commonwealth University - 9th in school history in singles wins.
